name: Build Android APK

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout Source Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: 24
        cache: 'npm'

    - name: Install Dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Set up JDK 21
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        distribution: 'zulu'
        java-version: '21' # <-- Actualizado a Java 21 para máxima compatibilidad con Gradle moderno

    - name: Setup Android SDK
      uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3

    - name: Automatically Accept Android Licenses
      run: yes | sdkmanager --licenses || true

    - name: Sync Capacitor
      run: node node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor sync android

    - name: Build APK with Gradle
      run: |
        cd android
        chmod +x gradlew
        ./gradlew clean # Limpia compilaciones corruptas o cachés previas
        ./gradlew assembleDebug --stacktrace
